summary: Complete testing of MVNO Ta Telecom Integration. Backend: 23/23 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features tested and working. System runs in MOCK mode (USE_MOCK_API=true).
passed_tests: Login with admin@mvno.com / admin123 - OK
GET /api/clientes returns clients with expanded fields (tipo_pessoa, documento, data_nascimento, cep, endereco, numero_endereco, bairro, cidade, estado, city_code, dados_completos) - OK
POST /api/clientes validates CPF (rejects invalid documents) - OK
POST /api/clientes validates CNPJ (rejects invalid documents) - OK
POST /api/clientes validates CEP format - OK
PUT /api/clientes/{id} updates all expanded fields - OK
GET /api/planos returns plans with plan_code field - OK
POST /api/planos accepts plan_code - OK
GET /api/ofertas returns offers with plan_code from linked plan - OK
GET /api/chips returns chips with msisdn field - OK
POST /api/operadora/sincronizar-planos syncs plans from operator (mock) - OK
POST /api/operadora/sincronizar-estoque syncs stock from operator (mock) - OK
GET /api/operadora/motivos-bloqueio returns 5 block reasons - OK
POST /api/ativacao validates client data completeness (rejects if missing required fields) - OK
POST /api/ativacao validates plan_code exists on the linked plan - OK
POST /api/ativacao creates line and updates chip with msisdn on success - OK
POST /api/linhas/{id}/bloquear-parcial blocks line partially - OK
POST /api/linhas/{id}/bloquear-total blocks line totally with reason code - OK
POST /api/linhas/{id}/desbloquear unblocks line - OK
POST /api/linhas/{id}/alterar-plano changes plan via new oferta_id - OK
GET /api/linhas/{id}/consultar queries line from operator - OK
Frontend: Clientes page shows Tipo, Documento, Dados (Completo/Incompleto), expanded form with address fields - OK
Frontend: Planos page has 'Sincronizar Operadora' button, plan_code shown on cards, plan_code field in create/edit dialog - OK
Frontend: Chips page has 'Sincronizar Estoque' button, MSISDN column in table - OK
Frontend: Linhas page has 5 action buttons per active line (Consultar, Bloqueio Parcial, Bloqueio Total, Desbloquear, Alterar Plano) - OK
Frontend: Linhas bloqueio total dialog shows motivo selection dropdown - OK
Frontend: Linhas alterar plano dialog shows oferta selection - OK
Frontend: Ativacoes page shows detected offer with plan_code - OK
critical_code_review_comments: Code is well-structured with clear separation of concerns
OperadoraService uses adapter pattern for Mock/Real API switching
Client data completeness check prevents activation with incomplete data
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
MOCK API simulates 70% success, 20% pending, 10% error for realistic testing
seed_data_creation: Seed data includes: 3 clients with complete data (Joao Silva, Maria Santos, Pedro Oliveira), 4 plans with plan_code (PLAN_5GB, PLAN_10GB, PLAN_20GB, PLAN_50GB), 4 offers, 5 chips. After sync: 3 additional mock plans (MOCK_5GB, MOCK_10GB, MOCK_20GB)
context_for_next_testing_agent: MVNO system with Ta Telecom integration. Major rewrite with: 1) Expanded client model (tipo_pessoa, documento, data_nascimento, address fields, dados_completos). 2) Plans with plan_code. 3) Chips with msisdn. 4) Operator sync endpoints. 5) Line action endpoints (bloquear-parcial, bloquear-total, desbloquear, alterar-plano, consultar). 6) CPF/CNPJ/CEP validation. 7) Client data completeness check before activation. System runs in MOCK mode (USE_MOCK_API=true). Auth via httpOnly cookies.

mocked_apis.OperadoraService: MockTaTelecomAdapter in /app/backend/services/operadora_service.py simulates Ta Telecom API. Activation has 70% success, 20% pending, 10% error rate. USE_MOCK_API=true in backend/.env

ui: Table shows Tipo, Documento, Dados columns
Block total dialog has motivo dropdown
Alterar plano dialog has oferta dropdown

ativacoes.auto_detection: Offer and plan auto-detected from ICCID
